Watcom 11.0c End User Terms and Conditions

1. Sybase retains title to the Patch, and all copies thereof, and all
  associated Intellectual Property Rights therein.  End User may not copy the
  Patch, except for inactive backup and archival purposes only, and must
  include on all copies of the Patch all copyright, government restricted
  rights and other proprietary notices or legends included on the Patch when
  it was delivered to such End User.

2. End User must agree to comply with all export and re-export restrictions and
  regulations ("Export Restrictions") imposed by the government of the United
  States. If any Patch license is provided to the U.S. government, the use,
  duplication or disclosure of the software and documentation by the U.S.
  Government shall be provided subject to terms and conditions consistent
  with these Minimum Terms and Conditions and any applicable FAR provisions,
  for example, FAR 52.227-19.

3. End User shall not modify, reverse engineer, reverse assemble or reverse
  compile the Patch or any part thereof.

4. NEITHER SYBASE NOR ANY OF ITS SUBSIDIARIES NOR LICENSORS SHALL BE LIABLE
  FOR ANY DAMAGES INCLUDING; DIRECT, LOSS OF PROFITS, LOSS OR INACCURACY OF
  DATA, INDIRECT, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, EVEN IF SYBASE
  HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

5. THE PATCH IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND SYBASE AND ITS SUBSIDIARIES DISCLAIM ALL
  WARRANTIES AND CONDITIONS, EXPRESS AND IMPLIED, INCLUDING WARRANTY OF TITLE
  AND NONINFRINGEMENT AND THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS
  FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

6. The Patch and accompanying Documentation have been created by third parties
  and Sybase disclaims all legal responsibility for the Patch and the Programs.

7. The Patch and Programs are End of Life products and therefore are not
  supported, maintained or warranted by Sybase.

8. Any claims or disputes with respect to services provided by third parties
are solely between the End User and those third parties or their successor(s).
Sybase hereby disclaims all legal responsibility in such cases.

9. Redistribution Rights. The End User shall have the same Redistribution
rights that they were granted under the license of the corresponding Watcom
product as originally licensed.

SciTech has amended this EULA with the following additional terms and
conditions. These additional SciTech provisions are offered solely by SciTech
and do not alter any of the above license terms and Sybase hereby disclaims
all related responsibilities or liabilities.

1. NEITHER SCITECH NOR ANY OF ITS SUBSIDIARIES NOR LICENSORS SHALL BE LIABLE
  FOR ANY DAMAGES INCLUDING; DIRECT, LOSS OF PROFITS, LOSS OR INACCURACY OF
  DATA, INDIRECT, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, EVEN IF
  SCITECH HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

2. THE PATCH IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND SCITECH AND ITS SUBSIDIARIES DISCLAIM
  ALL WARRANTIES AND CONDITIONS, EXPRESS AND IMPLIED, INCLUDING WARRANTY OF
  TITLE AND NONINFRINGEMENT AND THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND
  FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.
